articles.title: ‘State-sanctioned cruelty’: Chelsea family sues ICE after Mother’s Day arrest last year
articles.description:
ICE agents smashed a car window and arrested a father in front of his children as they were heading to church on Mother's Day in Chelsea.

The post ‘State-sanctioned cruelty’: Chelsea family sues ICE after Mother’s Day arrest last year appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE arrested a father in Chelsea on Mother's Day 2022, shocking his children.
The family is suing ICE for the traumatic incident involving a smashed car window.
This lawsuit highlights ongoing concerns about ICE actions affecting Boston's immigrant community.

articles.title: In rare sightings, scientists spot blue whales in waters off Martha’s Vineyard
articles.description:
This is the first time scientists with the New England Aquarium have seen blue whales in southern New England waters.

The post In rare sightings, scientists spot blue whales in waters off Martha’s Vineyard appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Scientists spotted blue whales off Martha's Vineyard for the first time ever.
New England Aquarium researchers confirmed the rare sightings on March 5, 2026.
This discovery highlights the importance of protecting marine ecosystems for local biodiversity.

articles.title: One person found, one still missing after fishing boat overturns off Cape Cod
articles.description:

summary: Coast Guard recovered one unconscious person after the Yankee Rose overturned off Cape Cod.

Local fishing community on alert as search efforts continue for the missing individual.
